stemHtml: A pilot's license holder applies for an aerobatic rating. The holder must undergo a training course at an ATO or DTO, and must be aware that the privileges of the aerobatic rating...

options.a: may be exercised for the aircraft category in which the flight instruction was completed.
options.b: include sailplane-towing, and may be exercised on all aircraft categories held by the pilot.
options.c: may be exercised for all aircraft categories held by the pilot.
options.d: include banner-towing, and may be exercised on the aircraft category in which the flight instruction was completed.
